title: I have a question please help
display_title: I have a question please help
wikitext:
[]: I have a question please help!!!!             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Nov 07, 2005 8:24 pm Everyone in this forum must think I'm stupid after I ask this question. I ment to ask Aaron at OTAkon this year but i was afraid that I would be thrown out. So anyway heres my question. After watching the End of Evangelion 26 times with out rest I noticed something. That when the entry plugs arebeing loaded into the Mass Production Eva's they say "Kaworu" on them. Why? I know that Kaworu Nageisa/Tabris is the best character besides Rei and Pen2 on the show but still why? Thank you for listening to my ramblong and that same time my qusetion. I f you want to see the screen shot of this Email me. Thank you all so much and please don't kick me out. Love always Yuko-chan

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Mon Nov 07, 2005 8:44 pm The entry plugs that you see being loaded into the mass production evas are Kawarou's dummy plug. Just like Nerv had dummy plugs which used Rei's pilot data to operate an Eva, Seele used dummy plugs with Kawarou's pilot data to operate the mass production evas. In case you ask about that: Dummy plugs don't have pilots in them, but are just a collection of computers that were programmed to operate an eva using either: 1) Rei's pilot data for Nerv, or 2) Kawarou's pilot data for Seele.

[]: good website for eva info             Quote Post by rei-freak » Mon Nov 07, 2005 9:31 pm If you want good info on eva go to[url]http://wikipedia.org[/url] and type evangelion in the search bar. It can tell almost anything you could possibly need to know about eva.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Mon Nov 07, 2005 9:37 pm Actually it cannot. Wikipedia just gives you a small sumarary. There is an info section in the main part of Evamonkey( http://www.evamonkey.com ) under Resources. It should tell you everything you desire to learn.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Nov 07, 2005 10:08 pm Pen^3's old FAQ for the Japan.anime.evangelion Usenet group is somewhat outdated now but still very useful: http://www.users.on.net/~attema/Pen3/faq/

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Mon Nov 07, 2005 10:11 pm A question to add to this thread: On the website drinian linked to, it shows eva-0 fishing. Could someone familiar with the game tell me why she's fishing?

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Tue Nov 08, 2005 8:46 am It is from Koutetsu no Girlfriend 2nd. One of the Evangelion Video games. In the game, the children go out to a lake and for reasons unbeknownst to me, Eva 00 is fishing.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Tue Nov 08, 2005 9:53 am is there any game script or something, where I can see the iron maiden 1 & 2 story??

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 08, 2005 3:10 pm There's an overview of the games here http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/geektionary.html#gos and Reichu's GOS2 walkthrough here http://www.gamefaqs.com/computer/doswin/game/918522.html And if a-l-s.com were operational, there was a torrent of screen captures for the latter.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Tue Nov 08, 2005 3:12 pm I want just enough money, to buy all the things I want right now. Including a PS2 for those 2 Neon Genesis Evangelion games... I can't seem to find any screen shots of the game. Is it like cel-shaded 3D, or is it 2D-like, with a 3D atmosphere.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Tue Nov 08, 2005 3:52 pm I......WANT........THAT........GAME..........in english please ^^ (I'm doomed :P) btw sdb4 it's a 2d sim-dating-like-kick-ass-game :P

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Tue Nov 08, 2005 4:12 pm Oh. I see. I like Sim-dating games. Unless they have a crap dialogue... But since it's an actual game instead of a flash game, it must have true character dialogue. I want it...

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Jan 20, 2006 1:28 pm Since I don't want to make unnecessary topic, I'd throw up my lil' question. In the last part, we can see Shinji strangling Asuka. Although I heard some possible answers, I want to have a wider view on this, because its a crucial moment, I think. And the last words of the whole anime ("I feel sick" /Asuka/) makes me giggle... And a second thing: how could SEELE make Kaoru's dummy plug? How could they make Kaoru do it? I have no idea on that.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jan 20, 2006 2:08 pm Asuka's last line: other translations that have been given are are "This sucks." or (via the French), "You're pathetic." The real story of how it came about is at http://animaniajapan.livedoor.biz/archives/17687653.html Maybe Kaworu was asked nicely and he co-operated. He seemed easy-going enough.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Jan 20, 2006 2:26 pm I was not clear enough, as I see. I asked: why is Shinji strangling Asuka in the end of the whole anime? The last words however have many secondary meanings, I guess. On the other hand, thanks again! Some new reading stuff sure makes my nerves excited... /After reading/ Wow... I never thought that Anno was such a fanatic. But I can't blame him. Miyumara's idea is a lot better than the original one, I think. It tells a dozen times more than that longer line. And it really sounds like Asuka, even more than the original line. That would have been too long in that situation, I guess. Miyumara's idea has the raw force of a hammer and the style of a rapier, which is exactly like Asuka, I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jan 20, 2006 3:59 pm Why strangle, eh? I've not seen an explanation that totally satisfies me. It could be any of - carrying on from where he left off in Complementation - having been alone for long enough that his first reaction is "You bitch! You know how long I've been here by myself!?" - or he could carrying out some act of twisted love and is just doing what he thought Asuka would want, given her last recorded words to him â€œBut, if I have to be with you, I'd rather die!â€ . (He is his father's son, after all.)

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sat Jan 21, 2006 1:51 pm Well these are all possible. But I'm agree with you; this is bogus. There has to be some reason to strangle one of your best friend! Or maybe I'm just naive like Maya. Heh... :? BTW Do you know where can I get the translation of the songs "Kokoro" and "Tamashii"? English, of course. I can't speak Japanese, and reading is just... well... need to say more?
